arts.ttl: Liverpool made massive summer offer for Khvicha Kvaratskhelia
arts.sum: Serie A giants Napoli were faced with the possibility of selling Khvicha Kvaratskhelia to Liverpool last summer, months before they sold the player to Paris Saint-Germain. This background is provided…

arts.ttl: Joshua Kimmich yet to respond to PSG contract offer amid talks over Bayern Munich extension
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are long-time admirers of Joshua Kimmich (30) and they have now made their move. Bild and Sky Sports Germany have both revealed that, with the German international’s contract expiring this summer, PSG…

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds 'learn' Milos Kerkez asking price ahead of potential summer move
arts.sum: Premier League leaders Liverpool reportedly learn how much it will take to sign Bournemouth left-back Milos Kerkez this summer.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool could face battle with Real Madrid for £50m Premier League player this summer
arts.sum: TBR Football understands that Dean Huijsen could be heading to Spain this summer with Real Madrid and Atletico Madrid ready to do battle for him....

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher names who will win Champions League as Liverpool vs PSG prediction delivered
arts.sum: Liverpool face PSG in the Champions League last 16 as the Reds seek a seventh European Cup win this season.

arts.ttl: Liverpool rival Barcelona for Leao - Wednesday's gossip
arts.sum: Liverpool are considering a move for AC Milan forward Rafael Leao, Liverpool striker Darwin Nunez was blocked from leaving in January and Manchester City are targeting Leicester's teenage sensation Jeremy Monga.

arts.ttl: Man Utd OUT, Chelsea IN: Liverpool face new threat for €50m superstar
arts.sum: Man Utd held a long-standing interest in the Hungary international, but Ben Jacobs reports that they are not expected to pursue a move for Kerkez given that they signed Patrick Dorgu in the January transfer window. The Bournemouth left-back has emerged as one of the Premier League's most sought-after prospects since joining the Cherries in 2023.

arts.ttl: What Time Does Liverpool Play Today? Champions League vs. PSG (Mar. 5)
arts.sum: Liverpool travel to France to take on Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League round of 16.

arts.ttl: Liverpool on course to break £700m barrier that could alter Man City dynamic
arts.sum: Liverpool made a £57m loss for 2023/24 but are set for a bumper financial year for 2024/25

arts.ttl: Five Liverpool stars drop early team news hints for PSG as Cody Gakpo decision made
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool team news ahead of their Champions League showdown with Paris Saint-Germain.
